channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Tesla Faces Fierce New Rival in Self-Driving Race
item.description: It has been assumed up until recently that the primary challenge to Tesla’s (NASDAQ: TSLA) self-driving business was Google Waymo. Other technologies from smaller companies exist. And major legacy car companies like GM (NYSE: GM) are developing their own products.

item.title: Why Charter Communications Is Today’s Top S&P 500 Stock
item.description: Charter Communications stock is at the top of the S&P 500. SpaceX and Comcast are part of the move with possible changes coming to U.S. Internet providers.

item.title: Comcast, Charter, Rocket Lab, SpaceX, Tesla, and More Stocks That Explain Today’s Market
item.description: Stocks rose on Monday with tech shares mostly bouncing back and the set to snap its five-day losing streak. In addition, the Supreme Court on Monday rejected President Donald Trump’s attempt to remove Federal Reserve governor Lisa Cook. Comcast stock gained 7%, paring back gains from a premarke...

item.title: Tesla reveals huge Cybercab detail in new guide for First Responders
item.description: Tesla revealed a major new Cybercab detail in a guide it released for First Responders, showing new territory in its beliefs and intentions for the ride-hailing-focused vehicle that entered production in April. The First Responders Guide is released to give fire departments, paramedics, and other...

item.title: Invesco’s SPHD Pays 4.57% While the S&P 500 Pays 0.98%, And It Is Up This Year Without the Tech Bubble Risk
item.description: Due to the attention given to their trillion dollar market caps and preoccupation with A.I., the Magnificent 7 stocks (Apple, Amazon, Alphabet/Google, Meta Platforms/Facebook, Nvidia, Microsoft, and Tesla) often make people forget that there are 493 other stocks in the S&P 500 worth investors’ co...

item.title: Tesla Recovers Alongside Magnificent Seven, Analysts Chime In On Deliveries
item.description: Tesla stock rose more than 3% on Monday, after a poor showing the week prior. Elon Musk's automaker will report second-quarter deliveries this week.

item.title: Tesla Full Self-Driving v14 ‘Lite’ Release Notes: new capabilities and features
item.description: Tesla released the Full Self-Driving v14 ‘Lite’ suite to owners of Hardware 3 or AI3 vehicles today, adding several new features to the vehicles that were once believed to be capable of unsupervised self-driving. Now, Tesla has released this modified suite to older Tesla vehicles , adding plenty ...

item.title: Tesla Full Self-Driving v14 ‘Lite’ for older cars finally gets released
item.description: Tesla has finally released its Full Self-Driving v14 ‘Lite’ suite for older cars that equip the Hardware 3 or AI 3 chip, which have not been able to handle the newest versions of the company’s driver assistance software. Tesla officially started releasing the v14 Lite suite to owners in the Early...

item.title: Robot hand company settles Tesla trade secret suit and announces $11M raise
item.description: The startup, Proception, is taking a unique approach to collecting training data to tackle one of the hardest problems in robotics: hands.

item.title: Wall Street Is Divided On Tesla, but I Keep Buying The Stock
item.description: I bought Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) again last Friday, and I will probably buy it again next month. The bears on Reddit and the seven analysts carrying Sell or Strong Sell ratings have not talked me out of it, and neither has a year-to-date drawdown of -15.57%. I keep coming back to the buy button becau...

item.title: Tesla starts FSD v14 ‘Lite’ rollout to HW3 cars
item.description: Tesla has started rolling out FSD v14 “Lite” to its Hardware 3 (HW3) cars, the company’s AI chief Ashok Elluswamy confirmed today. The build, firmware version 2026.20.5.1, is going out first to early-access drivers. It’s the first major Full Self-Driving update for the roughly 4 million HW3 vehic...

item.title: Tesla batteries stolen from Giga Nevada 11+ times since December
item.description: Trailers loaded with millions of dollars of Tesla car and home batteries have been stolen straight from loading docks at the company’s Nevada operations at least 11 times since December, according to sheriff’s records. Nine of the suspected cargo thefts happened in January alone, and a local dete...

item.title: Tesla Faces Q2 Delivery Test
item.description: Barclays expects stronger China and Europe sales to offset U.S. weakness.

item.title: Tesla Stock Rises as EV Maker Deepens Ties With SpaceX
item.description: FEATURE After a tough week, Tesla stock is up early Monday. Tweets from CEO Elon Musk might be helping. Shares of the electric-vehicle maker were up 0.7% in premarket trading at $382.38.

item.title: Morgan Stanley Lifts Tesla Delivery Forecast on Stronger Europe and China Demand (TSLA)
item.description: Morgan Stanley has increased its forecast for Tesla’s (NASDAQ:TSLA) second-quarter vehicle deliveries after stronger-than-expected sales trends in Europe and China, although the bank continues to take a cautious view of the company’s energy storage business. The brokerage now expects Tesla to del...

item.title: Comcast, Alphabet, Palantir, SpaceX, Microsoft, and More Stocks That Explain Today’s Market
item.description: Technology stocks were trading higher in premarket trading Monday as the looked set to finally snap its five-day losing streak. Semiconductor companies, other artificial-intelligence stocks, and the Magnificent Seven were among those rebounding to start the week. Microsoft jumped 2% ahead of th...

item.title: Elon Musk ally backs British electric car battery start-up
item.description: A close ally of Elon Musk has backed a British start-up developing electric vehicle (EV) charging technology that aims to cut the risk of battery fires.

item.title: Dow, Nasdaq, S&P 500 Futures Rise On US-Iran Truce Hopes: Why DRAM, AAPL, TSLA, SPCX, BB, WEN, STI Are In Focus
item.description: Stocktwits data showed retail sentiment around SPY was ‘bearish’, while QQQ sentiment remained ‘bullish.’

item.title: This Space Stock Could Make You Rich (Hint: It's Not SpaceX)
item.description: SpaceX relies on a key supplier for many of its growth initiatives.

item.title: TSLA Stock Rises Premarket: Tesla Gives Millions Of Older Cars A Major FSD Boost
item.description: Tesla AI chief Ashok Elluswamy said the build is rolling out to “AI3 early-access customers” and will expand “over the next few weeks” based on feedback.

item.title: JPMorgan Lowers Q2 Delivery Estimates for Tesla (TSLA), Here’s What You Need to Know
item.description: Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) is one of the Stocks That Will Make You Rich Over the Next 3 Years. Tesla, Inc.

item.title: FSD v14 Lite HW3 released
item.description: submitted by /u/iilordd [link] [comments]

item.title: Cybercab Drive By at Crissy Field Beach
item.description: My wife and I drove by this Cybercab over by Crissy Field East Beach by the Golden Gate Bridge in San Francisco, figured I’d share this quick drive by video we got. submitted by /u/LinkSurvivor [link] [comments]

item.title: TSLA Stock Under Pressure: Analyst Says $600 Bull Case Hinges On 40-Car Robotaxi Fleet Scaling Past Nasdaq Lag
item.description: Gary Black said Tesla may need to expand unsupervised autonomy into markets serving 50% of the U.S. population, but will likely need FSD efficacy to reach 99.99% first.

item.title: Dow Jones Futures Rise On U.S.-Iran News; Market At Tipping Point
item.description: The U.S. and Iran reportedly have agreed to halt tit-for-tat attacks. Tesla sales and the June jobs report on are on tap.

item.title: Tesla Reports Q2 Deliveries in a Matter of Days. Here's the Number That Matters.
item.description: One number due in the first few days of July matters more than any robotaxi update right now.

item.title: SpaceX, Tesla, and Alphabet All Fall in a Broad Tech Rout. Should You Rebalance Your Portfolio?
item.description: Recent weakness in the market's hottest tickers has many investors suddenly rethinking everything.

item.title: Middle East Tensions, Tesla Deliveries and Other Can't Miss Items this Week
item.description: Markets enter a holiday-shortened week facing geopolitical escalation as Iran launched new strikes against U.S. bases in Bahrain and Kuwait early Sunday.

item.title: Survey Sunday: with nearly a trillion dollars, will Elon try to make things right?
item.description: Last week, we asked Electrek readers a simple whether they believed that Tesla and SpaceX CEO Elon Musk, after becoming the world’s first trillionaire, would finally make good on the ambitious promises he spent years making about accelerating sustainable energy, delivering unsupervised full self ...

item.title: Elon Musk Was First Trillionaire, Prediction Markets Pick This Magnificent Seven CEO To Be Second To Join Elite Club
item.description: With the public debut of SpaceX stock, Tesla Inc and SpaceX CEO Elon Musk became the world’s first trillionaire. Currently ranked over $600 billion ahead of the second-place holder, it could be years before the world sees another trillionaire. Here’s...

item.title: ‘High on Coke’: Elon Musk floored by Berkshire Hathaway's Coca-Cola dividend windfall. How to tap in and get rich
item.description: How investing in Buffett's favorite drink paid dividends.

item.title: I Let Wayve’s AI Car Drive Me Through London’s Busiest Streets
item.description: Autonomous vehicle startup Wayve is betting its AI-powered driving system can beat Alphabet’s Waymo and Tesla. WSJ’s Stephen Wilmot took it for a ride to test the technology.

item.title: Tesla Completes Key AI Chip Milestone in Its Push Beyond the Auto Industry
item.description: This is one more step for the business to expand into robotics and AI.

item.title: A $290,000 Tesla Semi for $50,000?? California’s Incentive Stack Is Real, but the Number Hides as Much as It Reveals.
item.description: A claim is circulating that stops you mid-scroll: a California small fleet can now buy a Tesla Semi for as little as $50,000. The Tesla Semi carries a $290,000 sticker. The post lays out how two California incentive programs stack to knock $240,000 off that price, leaving a net cost of roughly $5...

item.title: Tesla releases Cybercab First Responder Interaction Plan
item.description: Interesting points: - A Cybercab equipped with steering wheel, brake pedal, and an acceleration pedal is typically an engineering or test vehicle, and operates at SAE Level 2 autonomy. - First responders can talk to support via B-pillar microphones. - Cybercab Robotaxi can operate autonomously at...

item.title: Tesla Left a Big Hole in Short Sellers’ Pockets. It’s SpaceX’s Turn Now.
item.description: Short-sellers lost billions of dollars betting against Tesla over the last decade. Can SpaceX also be a short-seller killer like TSLA?

item.title: Prediction: Buying Rivian Stock Today Could Set You Up for Life
item.description: Rivian is copying Tesla's playbook for growth.

item.title: Micron (MU) Surpasses Market Valuation of ​Meta and Briefly Tesla, Reuters Reports
item.description: Micron Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ:MU) is one of the safe stocks for beginners to buy in 2026. Reuters reported on June 25 that Micron Technology, Inc.

item.title: Here's What a $50,000 Investment in SpaceX Stock Could Look Like in 10 Years, According to Billionaire Investor Ron Baron
item.description: SpaceX is getting a lot of attention, with everyone trying to figure out whether it's overvalued or just starting its ascent.

item.title: 3 Stocks That Could Benefit as the Robotaxi Race Heats Up
item.description: Autonomous vehicle technology continues to develop, and these companies could make the next stage of the driverless car revolution possible.

item.title: Tesla Q2 delivery consensus confirms this long-standing theory
item.description: Tesla released what analysts believe the company will report in terms of deliveries and energy deployments for Q2, but the figures seem to confirm a long-standing theory on the company’s vehicle division. For years, Tesla was just looked at as a car company. Now that it has established itself as ...

item.title: Mercedes posts Tesla-like efficiency hauling 36 tons through a German winter
item.description: Despite the rapidly growing number of heavy-duty EVs on western roads, a number of myths still persist about range, charging infrastructure, and economic viability. To combat those myths, Mercedes-Benz is sharing real-world data from 80 of its deployed electric semi trucks. Here’s what they found.

item.title: SpaceX vs. Tesla: Here's Which Elon Musk Stock I'd Buy Right Now
item.description: How do you choose today between two richly priced stocks with bright prospects in the distant future?

item.title: MarketBeat Week in Review – 06/22 - 06/26
item.description: SpaceX IPO buzz faded as AI volatility, hotter inflation, and a shortened trading week shifted investor focus toward earnings season

item.title: Jeff Bezos Challenges Elon Musk’s Tesla And SpaceX With Zoox Robotaxi, Blue Origin Mars Push
item.description: Jeff Bezos‘ companies are taking on Elon Musk‘s businesses on two fronts, as Amazon.com Inc. owned Zoox unveiled its updated Robotaxi while Bezos-owned Blue Origin showcased new technology aimed at future Mars missions. Zoox Unveils Updated Robotaxi Zoox, on Wednesday,...

item.title: After Issuing Its First Stock Split in 2020, Tesla Took Just 2 Years to Issue Its Second Split. Could a Third Stock Split Come in 2026?
item.description: Both of Tesla's previous stock splits happened during the month of August -- but don't expect another one to happen two months from now.

item.title: The Tesla Cybercab Has A Serious Challenge For Personal Vehicle Sales
item.description: We’ve written a few stories lately on why robotaxis may not do much more than replace human-driven taxis. There’s a lot of hype or hope around the idea that many people will switch from car ownership to using robotaxis, but is that really what’s likely to happen? Even beyond that, ...

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) Q2 2026 delivery consensus: 406,000 vehicles expected
item.description: Tesla released its company-compiled delivery consensus for the second quarter of 2026, and Wall Street analysts now expect the automaker to deliver 406,024 vehicles. That would be just 5.7% growth over the 384,122 vehicles Tesla delivered in Q2 2025 — a modest recovery for a company that has post...

item.title: Dow Jones Futures: Market At Tipping Point, Here's What To Do. Eli Lilly Soars, Tesla On Tap.
item.description: Here's what investors should do amid the stock market's divergent signals. Eli Lilly is strong while Tesla EV sales loom.
